name: accounting firms processing 10–50 invoices/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 10–50 invoices/month, discrepancies cause cash flow gaps. We reconcile daily bank transactions instead of manual reconciliation processes.
problem_solved: discrepancies between bank transactions and accounting records
